[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10100010 3
1 01101001 4
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000010 1
7 01000000 1

01 10 00000010 1 match 6
12 21 01000000 1 match 7
23 32 11000000 2
34 43 01100010 3
45 54 00100011 3
56 65 00100001 2
67 76 01010000 2
70 07 00000000 a match 2 3 4 5

13 31 01000010 2
24 42 01001001 3
35 53 10100010 3 match 0
46 64 01101001 4 match 1
57 75 00000000 a match 2 3 4 5
60 06 00001000 1
71 17 01000000 1 match 7

47 74 01000000 1 match 7

61 16 01000000 1 match 7
72 27 01000000 1 match 7
